name: Morning Reflections Devotional Journal
description: Guided morning devotional journal - 90 days of prompts drawn from the Morning Reflections with Rebecca radio series. Lined pages, scripture anchors, space for gratitude and intention.

name: Grace & Grit Tote Bag
description: Heavy-duty canvas tote with 'Grace & Grit' lettering, inspired by the show. Available in natural and black canvas. Great for market runs, books, or your Bible.

name: Lavender & Rosemary Soy Candle
description: Hand-poured soy wax candle scented with lavender and rosemary. 8 oz. Burns 40-45 hours. Crafted in small batches in Memphis, TN.

name: "Still Waters" Scripture Print (8x10)
description: 8x10 art print featuring Psalm 23:2 hand-lettered on cream cardstock. Arrives unframed. Perfect for a home office, prayer corner, or gift.

name: Howard Thurman Reader: Meditations for the Journey
description: Curated anthology of Howard Thurman's meditations. Selected and introduced by Rebecca Price for the Morning Reflections book club. Temporarily out of stock - reorder in progress.

name: Morning Reflections Coffee Mug (14 oz)
description: 14 oz ceramic mug printed with the Morning Reflections with Rebecca logo and Psalm 143:8. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

name: Compassion Fatigue Self-Care Workbook (Digital PDF)
description: Downloadable 32-page workbook for caregivers, nurses, chaplains, and social workers. Reflective exercises on boundaries, grief, and renewal. Written by Rebecca Price, BCC.

name: Zinnias & Sunlight Greeting Card Set (6-pack)
description: Set of 6 blank-inside greeting cards featuring original watercolor zinnias and black-eyed Susans. Printed on recycled cardstock. Each card includes a short devotional verse inside the envelope.

name: "Joy as Discipline" Enamel Pin
description: 1.25-inch soft enamel pin with gold plating. Features the phrase 'Joy as Discipline' - a signature phrase from Morning Reflections with Rebecca.

name: Brené Brown "Braving the Wilderness" (Signed Bookplate Edition)
description: Paperback copy of Brené Brown's Braving the Wilderness bundled with a signed bookplate and a short reflection note from Rebecca on why she recommends it for caregivers.

name: Radio Archive: Season 6 Devotional USB Drive
description: USB drive with all 52 episodes of Morning Reflections Season 6 (2025). High-quality MP3 files, curated playlist order, plus a printable listening guide PDF.

name: Faith in the Margins: A Chaplain's Field Notes (Paperback)
description: Rebecca Price's forthcoming memoir-in-essays exploring fifteen years of bedside ministry in Memphis. Pre-order opens October 2026. Draft listing - not yet live.
